settings.description: View and modify the configuration for performance statistic collection.

max_dataset_count.description: The maximum number of datasets that can be configured on the system.

max_filter_count.description: The maximum number of filters that can be applied to a configured performance dataset.

max_stat_size.description: The maximum size in bytes of a single performance dataset sample.

max_top_n_collection_count.description: The maximum valid value for the 'top_n_collection_count' setting.

max_workload_count.description: The maximum number of workloads that can be pinned to a configured performance dataset.

top_n_collection_count.description: The number of highest resource-consuming workloads tracked and collected by the system per configured performance dataset. The number of workloads pinned to a configured performance dataset does not count towards this value.
